nasb.text: “Behold, I am going to send an angel before you to guard you along the way and to bring you into the place which I have prepared.

esv.text: “Behold, I send an angel before you to guard you on the way and to bring you to the place that I have prepared.

cnv.text: “看哪，我在你面前差派使者，好在路上保護你，領你到我預備的地方去。

ccb.text: “看啊，我要差遣天使走在你前面，在路上保护你，带领你平安地到达我为你预备的地方。
